headline: Anthropic preps IPO while recruiting AI talent and restricting EU access
body: Anthropic is moving toward a public offering while simultaneously hiring top AI researchers like Andrej Karpathy and restricting access to its advanced cyber AI model in the EU. For healthcare organizations, this signals a critical inflection point: the company behind Claude may prioritize shareholder returns over the stability and accessibility healthcare systems depend on for clinical AI integration. IPO pressures typically force vendors to accelerate commercialization timelines and tighten licensing terms, which directly impacts how hospitals and health systems can deploy these tools in EHR workflows and value-based care models. The geographic restrictions already in place suggest future compliance complexity that healthcare entities will need to monitor closely as Anthropic's business model hardens post-IPO.
